title: ocotea auriculiformis
intro: Ocotea auriculiformis, also known as Ocotea, is a tropical evergreen tree native to Central and South America. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to its essential oils, particularly linalool and β-elemene. The Ocotea tree has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including inflammation, anxiety, and digestive problems, due to its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory properties. Ocotea is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or essential oil, which can be used to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and reduce stress levels.
